footer.blurb: Hand-finished jewelry, built for moments worth keeping.

privacy.body: Mayra only stores your Facebook profile picture and name for the purpose of signing in to Mayra.

delete.body: To delete your data, please contact the shop directly or remove this app from your Facebook settings.

editorial.title: Every ring is a quiet promise.
editorial.body: Hand-finished by attentive craftspeople, each Mayra design balances heritage with a contemporary line — built for moments you'll want to keep for a lifetime.
